sigWerErrors.reason: The preposition changes from 'el seguimiento' (the tracking) to 'de seguimiento' (of tracking), which is a minor grammatical change and does not alter the overall meaning.
'Verificarlo' (to verify it) and 'revisarlo' (to check it) are very close in meaning in this context; both refer to checking the status, so the meaning is preserved.
Changing 'por la aplicacion' (through the app) to 'en la aplicacion' (in the app) is a minor prepositional difference and does not change the intended meaning.
The insertion of 'en' before 'el informe electronico' (in the electronic report) slightly changes the grammatical structure but does not significantly affect the meaning.
